message:
perf(btree): skip monotone defrag sorts

Recognize large monotone cell-offset runs in sort_cells_desc_by_ptr. Descending pages can stream directly and ascending pages only need reverse(), avoiding pdqsort on compact-defrag delete paths.

perf-update-delete 10000 50 both on ts2: pre-patch baseline total 1143-1161ms / delete ~236ms; patched monotone run median total 1095ms / delete 220ms. Added large ascending and descending coverage to the existing specialized-sort test.
